member.name: T:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera
member.summary: An orbit camera that revolves around a target point in 3D space. Supports rotation (yaw/pitch), zoom (radius), and panning (target offset) with configurable speeds and axis inversion. Generates a perspective projection matrix suitable for Metal/Veldrid depth ranges [0, 1].

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera._radius
member.summary: The distance from the camera to . Clamped to the range [0.1, 200] during zoom operations.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.Yaw
member.summary: Gets the current yaw angle in radians (horizontal rotation around the target).

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.Pitch
member.summary: Gets the current pitch angle in radians (vertical tilt). Clamped to the range [-1.5, 1.5] to prevent gimbal lock.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.Position
member.summary: Gets the current world-space position of the camera, computed from , , , and radius.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.Target
member.summary: Gets or sets the world-space point the camera orbits around. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.Up
member.summary: Gets the up direction vector used to construct the view matrix. Always .

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.RotationSpeed
member.summary: Gets or sets the sensitivity multiplier applied to rotation input. Defaults to 0.01f.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.ZoomSpeed
member.summary: Gets or sets the sensitivity multiplier applied to zoom input. Defaults to 1.0f.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.PanSpeed
member.summary: Gets or sets the sensitivity multiplier applied to pan input. Defaults to 0.02f.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.InvertX
member.summary: Gets or sets whether horizontal (yaw) rotation is inverted. Defaults to false.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.InvertY
member.summary: Gets or sets whether vertical (pitch) rotation is inverted. Defaults to false.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.FieldOfView
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertical field of view in radians. Defaults to 45 degrees (PI / 4).

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.ViewMatrix
member.summary: Gets the current view matrix (look-at), recomputed whenever the camera position, target, or orientation changes.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.ProjectionMatrix
member.summary: Gets the current perspective projection matrix, suitable for Metal/Veldrid with a [0, 1] depth range. Updated via or .

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new and computes the initial camera position and view matrix from the default parameters.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.UpdateProjection(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Recomputes the perspective projection matrix from the given viewport dimensions. The matrix uses a [0, 1] depth range compatible with Metal/Veldrid backends, overriding the default System.Numerics [-1, 1] range.
member.param: The viewport width in pixels. Treated as 1 if zero.
The viewport height in pixels. Treated as 1 if zero.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.UpdateAspectRatio(System.Single)
member.summary: Recomputes the perspective projection matrix from the given aspect ratio. Useful when the raw aspect ratio is already known (e.g. during window resize). Uses a [0, 1] depth range compatible with Metal/Veldrid backends.
member.param: The viewport aspect ratio (width / height).

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.Rotate(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Applies a rotation delta to the camera's yaw and pitch angles, respecting , , and settings. Pitch is clamped to [-1.5, 1.5] radians to prevent gimbal lock. Recomputes the camera position and view matrix.
member.param: Horizontal input delta (e.g. mouse movement along X).
Vertical input delta (e.g. mouse movement along Y).

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.Zoom(System.Single)
member.summary: Adjusts the orbit radius (distance from camera to target) by the given delta, scaled by . The radius is clamped to [0.1, 200]. Recomputes the camera position and view matrix.
member.param: Zoom input delta. Positive values zoom out; negative values zoom in.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.Pan(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Pans the camera's point in screen-aligned directions, scaled by . The camera position moves along with the target so the viewing angle is preserved.
member.param: Horizontal pan delta (right is positive).
Vertical pan delta (up is positive).

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera.UpdatePosition
member.summary: Recomputes from spherical coordinates (yaw, pitch, radius) relative to , then updates using .

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Exceptions.GraphicsInitializationException
member.summary: Thrown when a graphics initialization step fails (backend init, device creation, etc.).

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Exceptions.GraphicsInitializationException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Platform error code if available (e.g. HRESULT for Windows, VkResult for Linux).

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Exceptions.InvalidModelInputException
member.summary: Thrown when model file input is invalid (null/empty path, missing file, unsupported format, directory passed as file, etc.).

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Exceptions.PipelineCreationException
member.summary: Thrown when a pipeline creation step fails.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Exceptions.PlatformDependencyException
member.summary: Thrown when a platform dependency is missing or unavailable (e.g. native library, driver, runtime).

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Exceptions.PlatformDependencyException.Platform
member.summary: The platform where the failure occurred (e.g. "Windows", "Linux", "macOS").

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Exceptions.PlatformDependencyException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Platform error code if available (e.g. HRESULT for Windows, VkResult for Linux).

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Exceptions.ResourceCreationException
member.summary: Thrown when a GPU resource creation fails (vertex buffer, index buffer, etc.).

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Exceptions.UnsupportedOperationException
member.summary: Thrown when an unsupported operation is attempted (replaces NotImplementedException in public-facing paths). Carries platform and operation info for diagnostics. Message is UI/Demo-consumable.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Exceptions.UnsupportedOperationException.Platform
member.summary: The platform where this operation is unsupported (e.g. "Windows", "Linux", "macOS").

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Exceptions.VideraException
member.summary: Base exception for all Videra domain exceptions. Provides structured diagnostic fields for programmatic consumption.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Exceptions.VideraException.Operation
member.summary: The operation that failed (e.g. "LoadModel", "Initialize", "CreateBuffer").

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Exceptions.VideraException.Context
member.summary: Optional structured key-value pairs for diagnostic context.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Geometry.RgbaFloat
member.summary: RGBA浮点颜色，与Veldrid的RgbaFloat兼容

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.DepthBufferConfiguration
member.summary: Configures depth buffer behavior across all rendering backends. All backends should use consistent depth configuration to ensure identical rendering results on Windows (D3D11), Linux (Vulkan), and macOS (Metal).

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.DepthBufferConfiguration.DepthFormat
member.summary: Logical depth buffer format selected by the backend.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.DepthBufferConfiguration.ClearDepthValue
member.summary: Depth clear value. All backends clear to this value at the start of each frame. Standard value: 1.0f (maximum depth, representing the far plane).

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.DepthBufferConfiguration.ClearStencilValue
member.summary: Stencil clear value. Standard: 0.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.DepthBufferConfiguration.DepthComparison
member.summary: Depth comparison function used for depth testing. Standard: LessEqual (fragment passes if its depth is less than or equal to the buffer).

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.DepthBufferConfiguration.Default
member.summary: Default shared depth configuration used across backends.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.DepthBufferFormat
member.summary: Logical depth buffer formats used by Videra. Individual backends map these to their nearest native format.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.DepthComparisonFunction
member.summary: Depth comparison functions, mapping to native equivalents on each platform: D3D11: COMPARISON_FUNC, Vulkan: VkCompareOp, Metal: MTLCompareFunction.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IBuffer
member.summary: GPU 缓冲区接口

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IBuffer.Update``1(``0)
member.summary: 更新缓冲区数据

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IBuffer.UpdateArray``1(``0[])
member.summary: 更新缓冲区数据（数组）

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IBuffer.SetData``1(``0,System.UInt32)
member.summary: 设置缓冲区数据（带偏移）

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IBuffer.SetData``1(``0[],System.UInt32)
member.summary: 设置缓冲区数据数组（带偏移）

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IBufferBindingCacheInvalidator
member.summary: Optional advanced seam for executors that cache buffer-bound descriptor or binding state. Callers can notify the executor when a buffer is being retired so stale cache entries do not accumulate.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor
member.summary: 命令执行器接口（封装 CommandList/CommandBuffer）。 Built-in D3D11/Vulkan/Metal backends share the portable path around direct buffer binding, draw submission, viewport/scissor, clear, and best-effort depth-state toggles. Advanced resource-set binding is not a common portability promise and may throw .

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.SetPipeline(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IPipeline)
member.summary: 设置当前 Pipeline

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.SetVertexBuffer(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IBuffer,System.UInt32)
member.summary: 设置顶点缓冲区

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.SetIndexBuffer(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IBuffer)
member.summary: 设置索引缓冲区

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.SetResourceSet(System.UInt32,Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceSet)
member.summary: 绑定 Resource Set。 Shipped native backends do not expose this as a common portable capability and may throw .

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.DrawIndexed(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: 绘制索引图元

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.DrawIndexed(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: 绘制索引图元（指定图元类型）

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.Draw(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: 绘制非索引图元

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.SetViewport(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: 设置 Viewport

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.SetScissorRect(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 设置 Scissor Rect

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.Clear(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: 清除颜色和深度缓冲

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.SetDepthState(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 设置深度状态。 Backends that cannot mutate depth state dynamically may treat this as a best-effort hint and rely on their default pipeline/frame depth configuration.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor.ResetDepthState
member.summary: 重置深度状态为默认。 The portable expectation is to return to the backend's standard frame depth behavior.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IFrameContext
member.summary: Represents one begun frame on a render surface. Disposing the context ends and presents the frame.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackend
member.summary: 跨平台图形后端抽象接口

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackend.Initialize(System.IntPtr,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 初始化图形后端（D3D11/Metal/Vulkan）

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackend.Resize(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 调整 Swapchain 大小

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackend.BeginFrame
member.summary: 开始渲染一帧

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackend.EndFrame
member.summary: 结束渲染并呈现

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackend.SetClearColor(System.Numerics.Vector4)
member.summary: 设置清屏颜色

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackend.GetResourceFactory
member.summary: 创建资源工厂

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackend.GetCommandExecutor
member.summary: 获取命令执行器

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.GraphicsBackendResolverResult
member.summary: Resolves a concrete graphics backend implementation for the current composition environment.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.GraphicsBackendResolverResult.#ctor(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackend,System.String)
member.summary: Resolves a concrete graphics backend implementation for the current composition environment.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackendResolver.ResolveBackend(Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendPreference,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Resolves a backend for the requested preference or returns an unavailable reason when the current composition environment cannot satisfy the request.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsDevice
member.summary: Internal graphics device abstraction that owns reusable rendering resources and can create one or more render surfaces.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsDeviceIdleBarrier
member.summary: Optional internal contract for devices that can quiesce GPU work before dependent resources are released.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IPipeline
member.summary: 渲染管线接口

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IShader
member.summary: Shader 接口

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceLayout
member.summary: Resource Layout 接口

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceSet
member.summary: Resource Set 接口

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IRenderSurface
member.summary: Internal render-surface abstraction bound to one device and one presentation target.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory
member.summary: GPU 资源创建工厂接口。 Built-in D3D11/Vulkan/Metal backends guarantee the minimum contract around buffer creation and pipeline creation. Advanced seams such as CreateShader and CreateResourceSet are not a portability promise on the shipped native backends and may throw .

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory.CreateVertexBuffer(Videra.Core.Geometry.VertexPositionNormalColor[])
member.summary: 创建顶点缓冲区

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory.CreateVertexBuffer(System.UInt32)
member.summary: 创建顶点缓冲区（指定大小）

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory.CreateIndexBuffer(System.UInt32[])
member.summary: 创建索引缓冲区

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory.CreateIndexBuffer(System.UInt32)
member.summary: 创建索引缓冲区（指定大小）

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory.CreateUniformBuffer(System.UInt32)
member.summary: 创建 Uniform Buffer (常量缓冲区)

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory.CreatePipeline(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.PipelineDescription)
member.summary: 创建 Pipeline (渲染管线)。 Built-in native backends adapt this richer description to the current minimum contract instead of promising full backend-specific shader/resource-layout parity.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory.CreatePipeline(System.UInt32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 创建简化的 Pipeline（用于基础渲染）

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory.CreateShader(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ShaderStage,System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: 创建 Shader (着色器)。 This remains an advanced seam; shipped native backends manage shaders internally and may throw .

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory.CreateResourceSet(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ResourceSetDescription)
member.summary: 创建 Resource Set (资源绑定集)。 This remains an advanced seam; shipped native backends may bind resources through backend-specific internal paths and throw .

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.PipelineDescription
member.summary: Pipeline 描述

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.VertexLayoutDescription
member.summary: 顶点布局描述

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.VertexElementDescription
member.summary: 顶点元素描述

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.VertexElementFormat
member.summary: 顶点元素格式

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ResourceLayoutDescription
member.summary: Resource Layout 描述

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ResourceLayoutElementDescription
member.summary: Resource Layout 元素描述

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ResourceKind
member.summary: 资源类型

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ResourceSetDescription
member.summary: Resource Set 描述

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ShaderStage
member.summary: Shader 阶段

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.PrimitiveTopology
member.summary: 图元拓扑

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.MeshTopology
member.summary: 网格拓扑（用于兼容）

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ISoftwareBackend
member.summary: Optional interface for software backends that render into a CPU framebuffer.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ISoftwareBackend.CopyFrameTo(System.IntPtr,System.Int32)
member.summary: Copies the current frame into the destination buffer with the given stride.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.LegacyGraphicsBackendAdapter
member.summary: Bridges the v1 monolithic backend contract into the internal device/surface split. This keeps platform backends unchanged while the orchestrator and engine migrate.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendFactory
member.summary: 平台后端工厂 - 根据运行时平台创建对应的图形后端

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendFactory.ConfigureResolver(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackendResolver)
member.summary: Configures the backend resolver used by the current composition layer. Passing null clears the resolver and leaves only software fallback available.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendFactory.CreateBackend(Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendPreference,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: 创建当前平台对应的图形后端

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendFactory.ResolveBackend(Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendRequest)
member.summary: Resolves the requested backend preference into a concrete backend and availability snapshot.
member.param: The backend request, including environment override behavior and whether is permitted.
member.returns: A resolution containing the concrete backend plus availability metadata. When a native backend is unavailable and is , the result falls back to software and surfaces the unavailable reason through and .
member.exception: Thrown when the requested native backend is unavailable and is . The exception message is the same unavailable reason that would otherwise populate .

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendFactory.GetPlatformName
member.summary: 获取当前平台名称

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendPreference
member.summary: Specifies the preferred graphics backend for rendering. Used at startup to select which rendering API the application should use.

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendPreference.Auto
member.summary: Automatically select the best available backend for the current platform. On Windows this prefers D3D11, on Linux Vulkan, and on macOS Metal.

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendPreference.Software
member.summary: Use a software-based rendering backend. Intended for testing and environments without GPU access.

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendPreference.D3D11
member.summary: Use the Direct3D 11 backend. Available on Windows only.

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendPreference.Vulkan
member.summary: Use the Vulkan backend. Available on Windows and Linux.

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Graphics.GraphicsBackendPreference.Metal
member.summary: Use the Metal backend. Available on macOS only.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.GridRenderer
member.summary: Renders an axis-aligned ground grid using line primitives. The grid is drawn at a configurable height and can be toggled on or off.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.GridRenderer.IsVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the grid is visible during rendering. When false, skips all rendering work. Default value is true.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.GridRenderer.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the Y-coordinate (height) at which the grid plane is drawn. Default value is 0.0f.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.GridRenderer.GridColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the color used for all grid lines. Default is a semi-transparent gray (0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 0.5).

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.GridRenderer.EnableDiagnostics
member.summary: Gets or sets whether diagnostic logging is enabled for draw calls. When true, index count is logged every 60 frames. Default value is false.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.GridRenderer.Initialize(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory)
member.summary: Initializes the grid renderer with the specified resource factory. Builds the grid geometry and creates GPU buffers immediately.
member.param: The resource factory used to create vertex, index, and uniform buffers. May be null, in which case the renderer is initialized but no buffers are created until is called with a valid factory.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.GridRenderer.Rebuild(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory)
member.summary: Rebuilds the grid geometry and recreates GPU buffers. Call this after changing , , or when the resource factory changes.
member.param: An optional replacement resource factory. If null, the previously set factory is reused.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.GridRenderer.Draw(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor,Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IPipeline,Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Draws the grid using the specified command executor, pipeline, and camera. Does nothing if is false or if any required resource is null.
member.param: The command executor used to issue draw commands. May be null.
The rendering pipeline to bind. May be null.
The orbit camera used for view-projection transforms.
The render target width in pixels.
The render target height in pixels.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.GridRenderer.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all GPU buffers held by this renderer.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D
member.summary: Represents a 3D object with independent position, rotation, and scale transforms, GPU-backed vertex and index buffers, and optional wireframe rendering support. Implements to release GPU resources.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.Id
member.summary: Gets the stable identity of this scene object.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of this object, used for logging and identification. Defaults to "Object".

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the world-space position of this object. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.Rotation
member.summary: Gets or sets the Euler rotation of this object in radians (X = pitch, Y = yaw, Z = roll). Defaults to .

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.Scale
member.summary: Gets or sets the uniform scale applied to this object along each axis. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.VertexBuffer
member.summary: Gets the GPU vertex buffer containing data, or null if the object has not been initialized.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.IndexBuffer
member.summary: Gets the GPU index buffer containing triangle indices, or null if the object has not been initialized.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.WorldBuffer
member.summary: Gets the GPU uniform buffer holding the current world matrix (64 bytes), or null if the object has not been initialized.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.IndexCount
member.summary: Gets the number of indices stored in .

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.Topology
member.summary: Gets the primitive topology (triangles, lines, or points) of the mesh data.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.LineIndexBuffer
member.summary: Gets the GPU index buffer containing extracted wireframe edge indices, or null if wireframe has not been initialized.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.LineVertexBuffer
member.summary: Gets the GPU vertex buffer used exclusively for wireframe rendering (with per-vertex custom colors), or null if wireframe has not been initialized.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.LineIndexCount
member.summary: Gets the number of indices stored in .

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.WorldMatrix
member.summary: Gets the computed world (model) matrix derived from the current , , and values. The matrix is recomputed on every access using SRT (Scale-Rotate-Translate) order.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all GPU resources (vertex, index, world, and wireframe buffers) held by this object.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.Initialize(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory,Videra.Core.Geometry.MeshData,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Creates and populates GPU buffers from the supplied data. Allocates vertex, index, and world-matrix uniform buffers on the GPU. On failure, any partially created resources are disposed before the exception propagates.
member.param: The resource factory used to create GPU buffers.
The mesh data containing vertices, indices, and topology.
An optional logger for diagnostic output. When null, a no-op logger is used.
member.exception: Thrown when has null or empty vertex/index data.
Thrown when the vertex or index data exceeds the maximum GPU buffer size ( bytes).

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.UpdateUniforms(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor)
member.summary: Uploads the current to the GPU world-matrix uniform buffer, ensuring the shader receives the latest transform before the next draw call.
member.param: The command executor owning the active GPU context (reserved for future use).

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.InitializeWireframe(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IResourceFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initializes wireframe rendering resources by extracting unique edges from the cached triangle indices. The extracted edges are uploaded to a dedicated GPU index buffer, and a copy of the original vertices is placed in a separate wireframe vertex buffer so that per-edge colors can be applied independently. Does nothing if the mesh topology is not or if no edges could be extracted.
member.param: The resource factory used to create GPU buffers.
An optional logger for diagnostic output. When null, a no-op logger is used.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D.UpdateWireframeColor(Videra.Core.Geometry.RgbaFloat)
member.summary: Updates the wireframe vertex buffer with the specified , replacing the color component of every cached vertex while preserving position and normal data. Does nothing if wireframe resources have not been initialized.
member.param: The RGBA color to apply to all wireframe vertices.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.PrimitiveCommandKind
member.summary: Stable primitive command identifiers used by the current cross-backend draw contract.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.RenderBindingSlots
member.summary: Stable vertex-buffer binding slots shared by the engine and backend implementations.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine
member.summary: Central rendering engine that orchestrates graphics back-end resources, scene objects, cameras, and visual helpers (grid, axes, wireframe) to produce each frame. Implements so that all GPU resources are released deterministically.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.Camera
member.summary: Gets the orbit camera used to view the scene.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.IsInitialized
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the engine has been initialized and is ready to render.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color used to clear the render target each frame.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.RenderScale
member.summary: Gets or sets the render scale factor applied during axis rendering. A value of 1.0 uses the default scale.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.EnableFrameLogging
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether periodic per-frame diagnostic logging is enabled. When , debug information is emitted every 60 frames.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.StyleService
member.summary: Gets the render style service that manages visual style parameters and notifies listeners when styles change.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.Grid
member.summary: Gets the grid renderer responsible for drawing the reference grid in the 3D viewport.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.Wireframe
member.summary: Gets the wireframe renderer that overlays wireframe geometry on scene objects.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.LastPipelineSnapshot
member.summary: Gets the last pipeline snapshot observed during a rendered frame, if one is available.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.RegisterPassContributor(Videra.Core.Graphics.RenderPipeline.Extensibility.RenderPassSlot,Videra.Core.Graphics.RenderPipeline.Extensibility.IRenderPassContributor)
member.summary: Registers an additional contributor for a stable render pass slot.
member.param: The pass slot to extend.
The contributor invoked after the built-in pass work for the slot.
member.remarks: Null contributors are rejected before engine state is checked. Calls made after disposal are ignored as a no-op and do not mutate the engine.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.ReplacePassContributor(Videra.Core.Graphics.RenderPipeline.Extensibility.RenderPassSlot,Videra.Core.Graphics.RenderPipeline.Extensibility.IRenderPassContributor)
member.summary: Replaces the built-in contributor for a stable render pass slot.
member.param: The pass slot whose default contributor should be replaced.
The contributor that replaces the built-in pass implementation.
member.remarks: Null contributors are rejected before engine state is checked. Calls made after disposal are ignored as a no-op and leave the previous contributor mapping unchanged.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.RegisterFrameHook(Videra.Core.Graphics.RenderPipeline.Extensibility.RenderFrameHookPoint,System.Action{Videra.Core.Graphics.RenderPipeline.Extensibility.RenderFrameHookContext})
member.summary: Registers a frame hook at one of the public pipeline hook points.
member.param: The hook point that will invoke the callback.
The callback to invoke for each frame at the selected hook point.
member.remarks: Null hooks are rejected before engine state is checked. Calls made after disposal are ignored as a no-op and do not add new hook registrations.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.GetRenderCapabilities
member.summary: Gets the public render capability snapshot for the current engine lifecycle state.
member.remarks: This query is safe before initialization and after disposal. In both states the returned snapshot reports IsInitialized = false while still exposing the public capability booleans and any last-known captured before disposal.

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.ShowAxis
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the origin axis helper is visible.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.#ctor(Videra.Core.Styles.Services.IRenderStyleService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: An optional implementation. When , a default is used.
An optional for diagnostic output. When , a no-op logger is used.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.AddObject(Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D)
member.summary: Adds a 3D object to the scene. If the engine has been initialized the object's wireframe buffers are created immediately.
member.param: The to add to the scene.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.RemoveObject(Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D)
member.summary: Removes a 3D object from the scene and disposes its GPU resources.
member.param: The to remove.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.ClearObjects
member.summary: Removes all objects from the scene and disposes their GPU resources.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.UpdateMesh(Videra.Core.Geometry.MeshData)
member.summary: This method is deprecated in the current architecture where each manages its own mesh. Calling it logs a warning.
member.param: Mesh data (ignored).

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.Draw
member.summary: Renders a single frame: clears the back-end, updates camera and style uniforms, draws the grid, solid scene objects, wireframe overlays, and axis helper, then presents the result. This method is thread-safe; calls are serialized via an internal lock.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all GPU resources held by the engine, including pipelines, buffers, renderers, scene objects, and the graphics back-end. Sets to .

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.Initialize(Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IGraphicsBackend)
member.summary: Initializes the engine with the specified graphics back-end. Creates GPU resources (camera buffer, style buffer, mesh pipeline) and initializes all sub-renderers (grid, axis, wireframe). If the engine is already initialized this method returns immediately.
member.param: The platform-specific graphics back-end to use for rendering.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.VideraEngine.Resize(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Resizes the internal render target and updates the camera projection matrix. Ignored when the engine is not initialized, when dimensions are zero, or when the size has not changed.
member.param: The new render target width in pixels.
The new render target height in pixels.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.EdgeExtractor
member.summary: 从三角形网格中提取边缘线

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.EdgeExtractor.Edge
member.summary: 边缘结构（规范化存储，确保唯一性）

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.EdgeExtractor.ExtractUniqueEdges(System.UInt32[])
member.summary: 从三角形索引数组中提取唯一边缘
member.param: 三角形索引数组（每3个索引一个三角形）
member.returns: 去重后的边缘线索引数组（每2个索引一条线）

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.EdgeExtractor.EstimateEdgeCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: 计算边缘数量（用于预估内存） 对于封闭流形网格：E = 3F/2（每条边被2个三角形共享）

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeMode
member.summary: 线框显示模式

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeMode.None
member.summary: 不显示线框

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeMode.AllEdges
member.summary: 显示所有边缘线（包括被遮挡的线，使用半透明或虚线）

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeMode.VisibleOnly
member.summary: 只显示可见的边缘线（隐藏线移除）

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeMode.Overlay
member.summary: 线框叠加在实体渲染之上

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeMode.WireframeOnly
member.summary: 只显示线框，不显示实体

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeRenderer
member.summary: 线框渲染器 - 负责渲染物体的边缘线

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeRenderer.Mode
member.summary: 线框显示模式

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeRenderer.LineColor
member.summary: 线框颜色

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeRenderer.HiddenLineColor
member.summary: 隐藏线颜色（AllEdges模式下使用）

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeRenderer.ShowHiddenLines
member.summary: 是否显示隐藏线（AllEdges模式专用）

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeRenderer.RenderWireframes(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Videra.Core.Graphics.Object3D},Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.ICommandExecutor,Videra.Core.Graphics.Abstractions.IPipeline,Videra.Core.Cameras.OrbitCamera,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: 渲染场景中所有物体的线框

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Graphics.Wireframe.WireframeRenderer.ShouldRenderSolid
member.summary: 判断是否应该渲染实体

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Logging.LoggerExtensions
member.summary: Logger extension methods for structured logging with consistent templates. Provides helper methods that map component-tagged messages to structured log properties.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Logging.LoggerExtensions.LogComponentInfo(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an informational message tagged with a component name.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Logging.LoggerExtensions.LogComponentDebug(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a debug message with component, action, and details.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Logging.LoggerExtensions.LogComponentError(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Logs an error message with component, action, and optional exception.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Logging.LoggerExtensions.LogComponentWarning(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a warning message tagged with a component name.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.NativeLibrary.NativeLibraryHelper
member.summary: Centralized helper for loading native libraries with fallback paths. Uses .NET Runtime's NativeLibrary API for cross-platform resolution.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.NativeLibrary.NativeLibraryHelper.TryLoadWithFallback(System.String[],System.IntPtr@)
member.summary: Try loading a native library from multiple candidate names, in priority order. Uses which handles platform-specific suffix and extension conventions.
member.param: Library names to try, in priority order (e.g., "libX11.so.6", "libX11.so", "libX11").
The loaded library handle, or if all candidates fail.
member.returns: true if a library was loaded successfully.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.NativeLibrary.NativeLibraryHelper.TryGetSymbol(System.IntPtr,System.String,System.IntPtr@)
member.summary: Get an exported symbol (function pointer) from a loaded native library.
member.param: Library handle from .
The exported symbol name (e.g., "XOpenDisplay").
The symbol pointer, or if not found.
member.returns: true if the symbol was found.

member.name: M:Videra.Core.NativeLibrary.NativeLibraryHelper.RegisterDllImportResolver(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Register a for the calling assembly that provides fallback library names when the primary name cannot be resolved.
member.param: The DllImport library name to intercept (e.g., "libX11.so.6"). This must match exactly what appears in [DllImport("...")] attributes.
Additional names to try, in order, if the primary name fails. The primary name is always tried first.

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.ColorParameters
member.summary: 色彩后处理参数

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.ColorParameters.TintColor
member.summary: 色调叠加 RGB [0-1]

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.ColorParameters.Brightness
member.summary: 亮度偏移 [-1, 1], 0=原始

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.LightingParameters
member.summary: 光照相关参数

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.LightingParameters.AmbientIntensity
member.summary: 环境光强度 [0-1]

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.LightingParameters.DiffuseIntensity
member.summary: 漫反射强度 [0-1]

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.LightingParameters.SpecularIntensity
member.summary: 高光强度 [0-1]

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.LightingParameters.LightDirection
member.summary: 主光源方向 (归一化向量)

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.MaterialParameters
member.summary: 材质表现参数

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.MaterialParameters.Opacity
member.summary: 整体透明度 [0-1]

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.MaterialParameters.UseVertexColor
member.summary: 是否使用顶点色 (false时使用OverrideColor)

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.MaterialParameters.OverrideColor
member.summary: 覆盖颜色 (当UseVertexColor=false时生效)

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.MaterialParameters.WireframeMode
member.summary: 线框渲染模式

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.OutlineParameters
member.summary: 描边/轮廓线参数

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.OutlineParameters.Enabled
member.summary: 是否启用描边

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.OutlineParameters.Color
member.summary: 描边颜色

member.name: P:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.OutlineParameters.Width
member.summary: 描边宽度 (像素) [0.5-5]

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.RenderStyleParameters
member.summary: 渲染风格参数 - 聚合所有子参数

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.RenderStyleParameters.Clone
member.summary: 深拷贝

member.name: M:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.RenderStyleParameters.ToUniformData
member.summary: 转换为GPU Uniform结构 (128 bytes aligned)

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Styles.Parameters.StyleUniformData
member.summary: GPU Uniform Buffer ��据结构 对齐到 128 bytes 以满足 GPU 常量缓冲区要求

member.name: T:Videra.Core.Styles.Presets.RenderStylePreset
member.summary: 渲染风格预设枚举

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Styles.Presets.RenderStylePreset.Realistic
member.summary: 真实 - 接近物理真实的光照

member.summary: 科技 - 蓝色调、科幻风格

member.name: F:Videra.Core.Styles.Presets.RenderStylePreset.Cartoon
member.summary: 卡通 - 描边、色块分明

member.summary: X光 - 半透明透视效果

member.summary: 黏土 - 单色哑光材质

member.summary: 当前风格参数
